titles.title: IAMAP: Unlocking Deep Learning in QGIS for non-coders and limited computing resources

citation.author: QGIS Development Team
citation.unstructured_citation: QGIS Development Team. (2025). QGIS geographic information system. Open Source Geospatial Foundation. https://qgis.org

citation.article_title: Deep learning in remote sensing: A comprehensive review and list of resources
citation.author: Zhu
citation.journal_title: IEEE geoscience and remote sensing magazine
citation.unstructured_citation: Zhu, X. X., Tuia, D., Mou, L., Xia, G.-S., Zhang, L., Xu, F., & Fraundorfer, F. (2017). Deep learning in remote sensing: A comprehensive review and list of resources. IEEE Geoscience and Remote Sensing Magazine, 5(4), 8–36. https://doi.org/10.1109/mgrs.2017.2762307

citation.article_title: Deep learning in environmental remote sensing: Achievements and challenges
citation.author: Yuan
citation.unstructured_citation: Yuan, Q., Shen, H., Li, T., Li, Z., Li, S., Jiang, Y., Xu, H., Tan, W., Yang, Q., Wang, J., Gao, J., & Zhang, L. (2020). Deep learning in environmental remote sensing: Achievements and challenges. Remote Sensing of Environment, 241, 111716. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.rse.2020.111716

citation.article_title: Coupling of deep learning and remote sensing: A comprehensive systematic literature review
citation.author: Yasir
citation.unstructured_citation: Yasir, M., Jianhua, W., Shanwei, L., Sheng, H., Mingming, X., & Hossain, M. (2023). Coupling of deep learning and remote sensing: A comprehensive systematic literature review. International Journal of Remote Sensing, 44(1), 157–193. https://doi.org/10.1080/01431161.2022.2161856

citation.article_title: How well do self-supervised models transfer?
citation.author: Ericsson
citation.journal_title: Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF conference on computer vision and pattern recognition

citation.article_title: An image is worth 16x16 words: Transformers for image recognition at scale
citation.author: Dosovitskiy

citation.article_title: Ten deep learning techniques to address small data problems with remote sensing

citation.journal_title: International Journal of Applied Earth Observation and Geoinformation
